instName: ﻿Christian Brothers of the Society of Mary
instNote: ﻿This society, founded by Rev. Wm. Jos. Cheminade, honorary canon of the Metropolitan church of Bordeaux, and approved by his Holiness Gregory XVI, April 23d, 1839, was recently established in Cincinnati, to be emplyed in the German schools in that city. Their Superior in this country is Rev. L. Meyer, who is assisted by Rev. Aug. Rollinet. The novitiate is at Nazareth, near Dayton, on a feritle and extensive farm.
